name: How to Allow Meta Business Suite to Access Your Photos
description: Learn how to grant access to your photos for Meta Business Suite. Follow our step-by-step guide and optimize your app experience. Start today!
main_title: How to Allow Meta Business Suite to Access Your Photos
richtext:
Adding photos to your posts on Meta Business Suite is a great way to catch your audience’s eye. Posts that include images get more engagement, and help you show off more of your business. Here’s how to allow Meta Business Suite access to your photos for posts.

‍

1. On Meta Business Suite, go to “Create Post.” This will take you to the post creator.

2. From there, click “Add Photo” on the Meta Business Suite post creator. This will open up the photos on your device. Click “Upload” on the photo you want to select. Remember, Instagram posts can only contain 10 photos, so don’t exceed that if you’re posting on Instagram.

3. Write whatever text you want to accompany your photo. Since the image does most of the talking, no need to write a lot of copy!

4. Publish or schedule your post!

‍

Creating posts with pictures helps draw your audience’s attention, driving engagement and increasing interactions. Try adding a photo to your Meta Business Suite posts today!

‍
